name: Splint — Short Leg

cptCodes.display: Application of short leg splint (calf to foot)

diagnoses.display: Nondisplaced fracture of medial malleolus of left tibia, initial encounter for closed fracture

otherSuppliesUsed: Plaster or fiberglass, cotton padding, ace wrap; posterior + stirrup
otherPostInstructions: Non-weight-bearing; crutches; ortho F/U in 5–7 days
